summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.application; import eu.kalafatic.utils.constants.FConstants; import eu.kalafatic.utils.preferences.ECorePreferences; public class MemoryUtils { private long heapSize; public static final MemoryUtils INSTANCE = new MemoryUtils(); private int maxAppMemory; private long heapSizeMB; public float getMemoryPerformance() { heapSize = Runtime.getRuntime().totalMemory(); maxAppMemory = FConstants.PREFERENCES.getInt(ECorePreferences.MAX_APP_MEMORY.getName(), (Integer) ECorePreferences.MAX_APP_MEMORY.getDef()); heapSizeMB = heapSize / (1024 * 1024); float onePercent = (maxAppMemory * 100) / 100;
